creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
I must admit that I only tested with poudriere testport ...

I'm also getting "a ton of errors" when running the tests and have reported the issue to the upstream mailing list:
https://lists.reproducible-builds.org/pipermail/diffoscope/2020-June/002642.html

The annoying no-tlsh-module warning has been added a while ago so I suspect that the test failures aren't new either.

"tlsh" hasn't been ported to FreeBSD yet, so unfortunately this isn't as simple as extending TEST_DEPENDS.

I'm also getting "list index out of range" errors with Python 3.7.7 so this doesn't seem to be a Python 3.8 issue.
